heading: Sixth replenishment
label: 290g–15 Sixth replenishment
notes: Subsequent Replenishment, , , 1501A–122, provided in part that the Secretary of the Treasury may contribute on behalf of the United States to the eighth replenishment of the resources of the African Development Fund, and authorized $300,000,000 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation.Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(2) [title V, § 594]113 Stat. 1535Nov. 29, 1999
amendments: Subsequent Replenishment, , , 1501A–122, provided in part that the Secretary of the Treasury may contribute on behalf of the United States to the eighth replenishment of the resources of the African Development Fund, and authorized $300,000,000 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation.Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(2) [title V, § 594]113 Stat. 1535Nov. 29, 1999

children.heading: Contribution authorized
children.label: a Contribution authorized
children.text: The United States Governor of the Fund is authorized to contribute $405,000,000 to the sixth replenishment of the resources of the Fund, except that such authority shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.text: In order to pay for the United States contribution provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $135,000,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
